parsed_review.summary: CP00-492 is a descriptor-only RP16 governance-core pack covering RP16.P04.M05.S17-RP16.P04.M06.S04 (10 units: M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail x6 + M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head x4). Read-only inspection of registry.js/service.js/validators.js confirms the pack binding, requirements, no-write attestation, descriptor + 2-section case set, coverage validator, Hermes/Claude evidence packets, and CP00-493 handoff are mutually consistent and align with contracts/governance-core-contract.json (current_pack + descriptor body + historical_pack_bindings tail = CP00-492), docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json (CP00-492 unit_count 10), packages/governance/README.md#cp00-492, the validator script, and 3 dedicated model.test.js tests. Every case-set row is descriptor_only:true / runtime_execution:false / customer_safe_errors_only:true / raw_payload_included:false, and row-extras add only benign descriptor metadata without overriding guards. Boundaries hold: synthetic_only, no_real_data, no governance/DLP/legal-hold/retention runtime, no state/audit writes, no Hermes runtime receipt; Hermes patterns are used only for the deterministic descriptor evidence packet/receipt shape, not product runtime. Authority boundary is preserved: claude_is_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human approval required for runtime opening (CP00-493); manifest production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false, and the Hermes production_ready_candidate=true is a coverage+slice candidate flag, not an enterprise-trust/production claim — no overclaim. Review hardening is in place: forbidden_review_evidence/invalid_review_blockers cover auth failure, zero-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields, and final-approval/enterprise-trust claims; the readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON) and no invalid review attempts are recorded for this pack. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room UI, LDIP invalid-attempt, workbook docs) are correctly classified as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved and excluded from pack scope. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one P3 informational note on post-review artifacts that are expected to be generated later in the hardening sequence.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts and gated commands not yet present (expected at this stage)
findings.details: The manifest lists evidence_refs/required_pack_artifacts including docs/closeout-packs/cp00-492/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist on disk. This is the expected mid-sequence state: pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending', valid_review_receipts is empty, and the hardened_review_sequence places finding_adjudication, construction_inspection, and final_closeout_validation AFTER this read_only Claude run. The post-review gated commands noted in command-evidence.json (closeout-pack:review:run/normalize/receipt:validate, closeout-pack-plan:generate, closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) are likewise still to be executed. Not a defect in the implementation under review.
findings.recommendation: Before final closeout/commit, ensure this accepted review is normalized into a valid review-receipt and that claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are generated and validated, and that the post-review gated commands pass. No change to the descriptor-only implementation is required.
